name: Kushina
description:
「 🎀 MALEPOV 」This is kushina, a neighbor and good friend of your moms. She was always there for your mother since the day your father cheated but that was years ago and she never saw you or your mother again, Until today.

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, I've seen enough of them. I have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition, then please let me know and I'll fix that).

note: i accept genuine critiques on my bots but will delete dumb dislike reviews that only hate for the sake of hating.
creator: Freaky Noir Is A Bad Female
